vision: A distraction-free mobile task management app that helps individuals stay organised by easily capturing, tracking, and completing daily tasks.

epics.name: App Foundation & Navigation
epics.description: Establish the core application architecture, navigation structure, and local data persistence to enable all subsequent features.

stories.title: Set up mobile app project structure
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want the app to launch quickly and reliably, so that I can access my tasks without delay.
acceptance_criteria: Given the app is installed When the user taps the app icon Then the app launches to the main screen within 2 seconds
Given the app is launched When the main screen loads Then a consistent navigation structure is displayed
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - establish project for iOS and Android builds

stories.title: Implement local data persistence layer
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved locally on my device, so that I don't lose my data when I close the app.
acceptance_criteria: Given tasks have been created When the user closes and reopens the app Then all previously created tasks are still visible
Given tasks exist in local storage When the app launches Then the task list loads within 2 seconds
stories.notes: Use local database or file storage appropriate for mobile platforms

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to create new tasks with essential details including title and due date.

stories.title: Create new task with title
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture what I need to do.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button Then a task creation form is displayed
Given I am on the task creation form When I enter a title and save Then the new task appears in my task list
Given I am creating a task When I try to save without a title Then I am shown a validation error

stories.title: Add due date to task
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want to set a due date when creating a task, so that I know when it needs to be completed.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I tap the due date field Then a date picker is displayed
Given I have selected a due date When I save the task Then the due date is displayed with the task in the list
Given I am creating a task When I choose not to set a due date Then the task is saved without a due date
stories.notes: Due date is optional based on requirements

epics.name: Task Completion
epics.description: Allow users to mark tasks as complete to track their progress and achievements.

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track what I've accomplished.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I tap the completion checkbox on an incomplete task Then the task is marked as complete with visual indication
Given a task is marked as complete When I view the task list Then the completed task displays differently from incomplete tasks

stories.title: Unmark task as incomplete
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want to unmark a completed task, so that I can correct mistakes or revisit tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing a completed task When I tap the completion checkbox Then the task is marked as incomplete
Given a task was unmarked as incomplete When I view the task list Then it displays as an active incomplete task

epics.name: Task List Display
epics.description: Present tasks in a clear, organised list format for easy viewing and management.

stories.title: View all tasks in list format
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do at a glance.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list format
Given tasks exist When I view the list Then each task shows its title, due date, and completion status
Given no tasks exist When I view the task list Then I see an empty state message encouraging me to add tasks

stories.title: Filter tasks by completion status
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want to filter my tasks by completion status, so that I can focus on incomplete tasks or review completed ones.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I select the 'incomplete' filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I am viewing my task list When I select the 'complete' filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given I have applied a filter When I select 'all' Then all tasks are displayed regardless of status

epics.name: Task Deletion
epics.description: Enable users to remove tasks they no longer need from their list.

stories.title: Delete task from list
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove items I no longer need to track.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I initiate delete on a task Then I am asked to confirm the deletion
Given I confirm task deletion When the deletion completes Then the task is permanently removed from my list
Given I am asked to confirm deletion When I cancel Then the task remains in my list
stories.notes: Include confirmation to prevent accidental deletion

stories.title: Swipe to delete task
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want to swipe a task to delete it, so that I can quickly remove tasks with a natural gesture.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I swipe left on a task Then a delete option is revealed
Given the delete option is revealed When I tap delete Then the confirmation dialog appears

epics.name: Visual Design & Polish
epics.description: Create a clean, distraction-free visual design that supports efficient task management.

stories.title: Design app icon and branding
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want the app to have a recognisable icon, so that I can easily find it on my device.
acceptance_criteria: Given the app is installed When I view my device home screen Then I see a distinctive app icon
Given the app icon exists When viewed at different sizes Then it remains clear and recognisable
stories.notes: Create icons for both iOS and Android specifications

stories.title: Apply consistent visual styling
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want the app to have a clean and simple design, so that I can focus on my tasks without distraction.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am using the app When I navigate between screens Then visual styling is consistent throughout
Given the app is displayed When I view any screen Then the design is clean with appropriate spacing and typography
stories.notes: Implement design system with consistent colours, fonts, and spacing

stories.title: Add task completion animations
stories.user_story: As a Individual User, I want satisfying visual feedback when I complete a task, so that I feel a sense of accomplishment.
acceptance_criteria: Given I mark a task as complete When the status changes Then a subtle completion animation plays
Given animations are playing When they complete Then the task settles into its completed visual state
stories.notes: Keep animations subtle and quick to not slow down workflow
